title: Frontend Developer | Block development.
description: Technical strategy and development of robust corporate ecosystems for ByteBerry Studio, including complex multilingual architectures and custom backends with Laravel.
body:
**Frontend Developer | Blog development**.

**Block Development and Template Logic** My job was to design and program **custom blocks** to provide a flexible and robust management experience. It used **ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)** for the data definition and **Twig** as the template engine (via Timber), ensuring a clear separation between the programming logic and the presentation layer. This approach made it possible to deliver clean, maintainable code free of unnecessary dependencies.

**Featured Projects**

- **ccib.es (Barcelona International Convention Center):** Development of multilingual architecture. Modular blog system that allows you to manage a large volume of content and events, integrating solutions to maintain the high availability of the site.
- **bandalux.com:** UI/UX interface implementation for a leading brand in solar control systems. I applied **modular SCSS** architectures and automation with **Node.js/NPM** to ensure a fast and scalable frontend.

**Tech stack**

- **CMS:** WordPress (Development of custom themes).
- **Key Tools:** ACF (Block Development), Twig / Timber.
- **Languages:** PHP, JavaScript (ES6), SASS/SCSS.
- **Workflow:** Git, NPM, task automation.
- **Optimization:** Performance, Caching management and accessibility.
